comment: 8yo whose mother has confirmed MEN2A (RET C634R pathogenic variant + medullary thyroid carcinoma diagnosed age 28 + bilateral pheochromocytoma). Patient untested, asymptomatic. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent F): standard = pre-test counseling + germline RET panel + age-appropriate prophylactic thyroidectomy timing per RET mutation classification (C634R = MEN2A high-risk → prophylactic thyroidectomy by age 5) + calcitonin q6mo + metanephrines q1y from age 8; alternative = empirical surveillance. Time-sensitive given RET-mutation classification — prophylactic thyroidectomy is curative if performed before MTC develops.
